summary: Enforce saved skill levels for saved-data role-limited type candidate filtering.
rootCause: Update08.18 converted saved-star resolved skill names and granted skill names into an ownership set, but it did not preserve the saved skill level. A row requiring the same skill at Lv2 could still pass when the saved star only unlocked Lv1, and a row containing both owned and unowned skill names could pass because the old check accepted any owned hit.
externalizationDecision: No HTML/CSS change. The fix is in external saved-mode type candidate JavaScript and regression tests.
minimumUserAcceptance: In saved-data mode, compare a candidate whose limited effect requires a higher skill level than the saved star currently unlocks. Confirm it is excluded at the lower saved star and appears/scores only after raising the saved star to unlock the required skill level.
